business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality group operating hotels, restaurants, and a corporate headquarters office

coverages_discussed.notes: Property schedule includes 8 locations with total insured value derived from listed TIVs.
Loss summary shows 28 WC claims, total paid 324545, total incurred 415934.
Loss summary shows 8 GL claims, total paid 8780, total incurred 82656.

positives: Eight scheduled locations, all in Texas.
Major hotel and restaurant locations are largely sprinklered.
Predominantly fire resistive or masonry/non-combustible construction.
Profitable operations with net income of 3220600 and equity of 52535400.
concerns: Hospitality and restaurant operations can present higher premises liability exposure.
All operations concentrated in Texas, creating geographic concentration risk.
Loss summary reflects 28 workers compensation claims, 8 general liability claims, and 2 property claims.
Insurance history shows varying annual claim counts, including 11 claims in 2024.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Loss summary shows WC: 28 claims, 324545 paid, 415934 incurred; GL: 8 claims, 8780 paid, 82656 incurred; Property: 2 claims, 178566 paid, 215927 incurred. Insurance history shows annual claims of 2 to 11 from 2020 through 2024.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Property schedule reflects a hospitality portfolio consisting of four hotel locations, three restaurant locations, and one corporate headquarters office, all located in Texas.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Insurance history lists carriers and premium/claim counts by year: 2024 Travelers Companies premium 686236.25 with 11 claims; 2023 Markel Corporation premium 619820.26 with 3 claims; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group premium 607294.45 with 6 claims; 2021 Chubb Limited premium 630843.2 with 9 claims; 2020 EMPLOYERS Insurance Group premium 580805.53 with 2 claims.
